data.content: Plan review approved. Verified: (1) /api/version?force=1 endpoint exists and returns {installedVersion, latestVersion, updateAvailable}, (2) force param correctly bypasses memory+disk caches, (3) Popover UI primitive available, (4) VersionBadge is a simple 36-line static span easy to wrap, (5) no conflicts with existing header hook that fetches /api/version on mount. Plan is complete, feasible, and correctly scoped.
